category_sources: Official homepage from source_facts.homepage is Taku Kudo's YamCha software page.
source_facts.description: NLP text chunker using Support Vector Machines.
display_name_sources: Official and package descriptions style the project as YamCha.
docs_sources: Official homepage from source_facts.homepage is the best available official documentation surface.
Search results for the official homepage identify YamCha as an NLP text chunker using SVMs.
repo_sources: No official source-control project URL was found; package source is distributed as an archive via source_facts.source-archive.
source_facts.homepage points to the official project page, not a source-control repository.
tags_sources: Official project page and package descriptions describe YamCha as a customizable text chunker for NLP tasks.
source_facts.description identifies YamCha as an NLP text chunker using Support Vector Machines.
